description: Composition Purple and grey plaid check shirt with white, blue and black accents, made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves, full buttoned placket, curved hemline and a pocket on left chest Fit Slim Wash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Preferably hand wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing, or flat dry Preferably steam iron This purple and grey plaid check shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe. The cool colour combination works well and gives off a fresh vibe. Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look. Model statistics The model wears size 40 Height: 6”; Shoulders: 18”
